agents.title: Score for Relevance
agents.shortDescription: Score this page (or every link on a listing) for relevance to your interests.

agents.title: Turn Into Podcast Script
agents.shortDescription: Convert the current page into a multi-host podcast script you can hand to text-to-speech.

agents.title: Extract Claims & Sources
agents.shortDescription: Pull out the main factual claims on this page, each grounded in a direct quote you can spot-check.
